notableEvents.label: Cooper Pratt GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Cooper Pratt grounds into a double play, second baseman Nico Hoerner to shortstop Dansby Swanson to first baseman Michael Busch. Sal Frelick out at 2nd. Cooper Pratt out at 1st.
